'''chotapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:lyghte|lyghte]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-t-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lyghte|lyghte]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chotapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chotapithi|chotapithi]] || [[word:chotapiji|chotapiji]] || [[word:chotapishi|chotapishi]] || [[word:chotapiki|chotapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chotaputhuthu|chotaputhuthu]] || [[word:chotapujuju|chotapujuju]] || [[word:chotapushushu|chotapushushu]] || [[word:chotapukuku|chotapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chotaputhu|chotaputhu]] || [[word:chotapuju|chotapuju]] || [[word:chotapushu|chotapushu]] || [[word:chotapuku|chotapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chotapufthuf|chotapufthuf]] || [[word:chotapufjuf|chotapufjuf]] || [[word:chotapufshuf|chotapufshuf]] || [[word:chotapufkuf|chotapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chotapethe|chotapethe]] || [[word:chotapeje|chotapeje]] || [[word:chotapeshe|chotapeshe]] || [[word:chotapeke|chotapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chotapothotho|chotapothotho]] || [[word:chotapojojo|chotapojojo]] || [[word:chotaposhosho|chotaposhosho]] || [[word:chotapokoko|chotapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chotapotho|chotapotho]] || [[word:chotapojo|chotapojo]] || [[word:chotaposho|chotaposho]] || [[word:chotapoko|chotapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chotapofthof|chotapofthof]] || [[word:chotapofjof|chotapofjof]] || [[word:chotapofshof|chotapofshof]] || [[word:chotapofkof|chotapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chotapĂŻfthĂŻf|chotapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chotapĂŻfjĂŻf|chotapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chotapĂŻfshĂŻf|chotapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chotapĂŻfkĂŻf|chotapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chotapĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|chotapĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chotapĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|chotapĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chotapĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|chotapĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chotapĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|chotapĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chotapĂŻfthĂŻf|chotapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chotapĂŻfjĂŻf|chotapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chotapĂŻfshĂŻf|chotapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chotapĂŻfkĂŻf|chotapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chotapĂŻfthĂŻf|chotapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chotapĂŻfjĂŻf|chotapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chotapĂŻfshĂŻf|chotapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chotapĂŻfkĂŻf|chotapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chotapĂŠthĂŠ|chotapĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:chotapĂŠjĂŠ|chotapĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:chotapĂŠshĂŠ|chotapĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:chotapĂŠkĂŠ|chotapĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chotapathatha|chotapathatha]] || [[word:chotapajaja|chotapajaja]] || [[word:chotapashasha|chotapashasha]] || [[word:chotapakaka|chotapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chotapatha|chotapatha]] || [[word:chotapaja|chotapaja]] || [[word:chotapasha|chotapasha]] || [[word:chotapaka|chotapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chotapafthaf|chotapafthaf]] || [[word:chotapafjaf|chotapafjaf]] || [[word:chotapafshaf|chotapafshaf]] || [[word:chotapafkaf|chotapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:chotapasha|chotapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:chotapshĂ«asha|chotapshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chotaproasha|chotaproasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chotapmuasha|chotapmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:chotapyaasha|chotapyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochotapnkshĂ«asha|gochotapnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochotapnkroasha|gochotapnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochotapnkmuasha|gochotapnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochotapnkyaasha|gochotapnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:chotatapasha|chotatapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chotatapshĂ«asha|chotatapshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chotataproasha|chotataproasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chotatapmuasha|chotatapmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chotatapyaasha|chotatapyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochotatapnkshĂ«asha|gochotatapnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochotatapnkroasha|gochotatapnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochotatapnkmuasha|gochotatapnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochotatapnkyaasha|gochotatapnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:chetĂŠpasha|chetĂŠpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chetĂŠpshĂ«asha|chetĂŠpshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chetĂŠproasha|chetĂŠproasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chetĂŠpmuasha|chetĂŠpmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chetĂŠpyaasha|chetĂŠpyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochetĂŠpnkshĂ«asha|gochetĂŠpnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochetĂŠpnkroasha|gochetĂŠpnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochetĂŠpnkmuasha|gochetĂŠpnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochetĂŠpnkyaasha|gochetĂŠpnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:chotfapasha|chotfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chotfapshĂ«asha|chotfapshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chotfaproasha|chotfaproasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chotfapmuasha|chotfapmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chotfapyaasha|chotfapyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochotfapnkshĂ«asha|gochotfapnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochotfapnkroasha|gochotfapnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochotfapnkmuasha|gochotfapnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochotfapnkyaasha|gochotfapnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
